quality.description_clarity: High. Clearly states immunity and suppression effects.

mechanics.primary_effect: Immunity to contracting diseases; suppression of existing diseases.
mechanics.balance_assessment: Appropriate for Uncommon rarity. Immunity to disease is a strong utility but not game-breaking.

llm_audit.archivist_notes: The item data is clean and consistent. The mechanics are straightforward and fit well within standard 5e item cataloging.
